data.title: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT research compounding across pipeline
data.description:
## User Story
As a planning pipeline orchestrator, I want research findings from brainstorm and feasibility phases to persist in a versioned `researchFindings` array in PREPLANNING_CONTEXT so downstream pipeline stages don't re-verify capabilities that have already been researched.

## Done Definitions
1. PREPLANNING_CONTEXT schema extended with versioned `researchFindings` array; each entry: `capability` (string), `status` (enum: verified/partially_verified/unverified/contradicted), `source` (URL or reference), `skill_name` (which skill produced this), `timestamp`
2. Brainstorm persists integration research findings as a `RESEARCH_FINDINGS:` prefixed ticket comment on the epic, in the structured researchFindings format. The feasibility-reviewer sub-agent output schema includes structured capability/status pairs that brainstorm maps to researchFindings entries.
3. Preplanning reads `RESEARCH_FINDINGS:` ticket comments during Step 5a and merges them into the `researchFindings` array in PREPLANNING_CONTEXT
4. Preplanning post-decomposition research phase: skips verified entries (no WebSearch), light-verifies partially_verified, fully researches unverified/contradicted; empty array triggers full verification
5. PREPLANNING_CONTEXT file includes `schema_version` field for forward/backward compatibility
6. implementation-plan's Context File Check gracefully handles PREPLANNING_CONTEXT payloads with or without the `researchFindings` field; existing behavior unaffected when field absent (verified by test)
7. Tests: structural boundary test validates schema fields in PREPLANNING_CONTEXT; integration test: given a PREPLANNING_CONTEXT with a verified capability, preplanning research phase skips WebSearch for that capability

## Considerations
- [Reliability] PREPLANNING_CONTEXT may not exist or be corrupted — read must be fail-open (treat as empty array)
- [Maintainability] Schema change must be documented; forward/backward compatibility via schema_version
- [Architecture] Brainstorm cannot write directly to PREPLANNING_CONTEXT (preplanning owns that write). Brainstorm findings must be persisted as a RESEARCH_FINDINGS: prefixed ticket comment; preplanning reads and merges during Step 5a.

## Escalation Policy
Escalate when blocked: Agents proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. All assumptions made without escalating are documented.
